title: Create: Chairs on Trains
description: more options for furnishing your trains
body:
you can now use chairs while on a Create train from other furniture mods such as: MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod, Macaw's Furniture, and Decorative Blocks

supported mods:
-   MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod (forge/neoforge only)
-   Macaw's Furniture
-   Decorative Blocks
